name: Morphous Horsetail
motif: bottle green segmented horsetail stems with joint black bands and mud-brown bases
paletteMood: bottle green joint black mud brown
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system derived from horsetail stems: bottle-green primary actions, joint-black structure, mud-brown support tones, wet-meadow neutrals, and narrow linear data accents.
typography: Geist-like product sans for dense operational UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, compact metrics, tabular numbers, and narrow data annotations.
layout: Linear segmented dashboards on an 8px grid, 8px radii, stem-rib dividers, compact forms, command search, readable tables, status strips, and restrained wet-meadow texture.
